findings.description: Configuration property names `dbManager` and `businessDateProvider` appear in the BasicPermissionFactory XML example in s3 content but are absent from s3 hints. These are key properties users may query when configuring the component.
findings.source_evidence: Source XML: `<property name="dbManager" ref="permissionCheckDbManager"/>` and `<property name="businessDateProvider" ref="businessDateProvider" />`
